para_trans: Department of Higher and Technical Education,
Pursuant to Article 23A (1) of the University Grants Commission (Deemed Universities) Regulations, 2023
In exercise of the powers conferred by the Government of Maharashtra, Prof. Dr. Bhushan Patwardhan,
Former Vice-Chairman, University Grants Commission, Deccan College of Postgraduate and Research, New Delhi
The Institute, Pune is appointing the Chancellor of the Deemed to be University.
Prof. Dr. Bhushan Patwardhan in the University Grants Commission (Deemed Universities) Regulations, 2023
Five years from the date of assumption of office as provided in Article 23A (1).
will hold office for a period of time.
The order is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
